prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年浙江省综合类最低录取位次分别为15177→15071→15142→16712→17433名。2021–2023年基本稳定在15000–15100名区间，2024年跳升至16712名（较上年后移约1570名），2025年继续后移至17433名（较上年再后移约721名），近两年累计后移约2290名，呈明显下行趋势；2025年基准位次约17433名；该校在浙江省综合类招生计划：2021年85人、2022年84人、2023年85人、2024年78人、2025年78人；2026年计划82人，较2025年增加4人，增幅约5.1%，属小幅扩招，对竞争压力有一定缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 东北大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第38名，近年排名稳定在36–39名区间，属于中上游985层次；2026年高考周期声誉评价为"中性/混合"，主要涉及秦皇岛校区命名争议，无重大负面舆情；2025年周期曾因6名矿加专业学生实习安全事故出现偏负面舆情，但影响范围有限；抖音综合热度排名第82位（样本14条视频，综合热度约27.8万），评价"一般"，在985高校中关注度偏低；未见投档断档或异常记录；第五轮学科评估中，控制科学与工程A+、计算机科学与技术A、软件工程A-、冶金工程A、机械工程A-、材料科学与工程A-，共6个A-及以上学科；控制、计算机、软件等优势学科与当前社会高热专业方向高度匹配，对高分考生有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业在2024–2026年专业热度分析中均被评为"高热推荐"或"推荐"，与东北大学优势学科方向吻合；浙江省2026年普通高考考生总数约40万人，较2025年29.08万人增长约37.6%，考生规模大幅增加将加剧全省各层次高校的竞争；省控线近年稳定（2025年普通类一段490分），未出现剧烈波动；东北大学位于辽宁省沈阳市，在浙江省属跨省招生，本地生源占比低；2026年计划82人占该校全国总计划比例较小，地域偏好因素对浙江考生报考决策影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合近两年位次持续后移趋势、2026年浙江省考生规模大幅增长（+37.6%）带来的竞争加剧、2026年招生计划小幅扩招（+4人）的缓冲作用，以及学校声誉中性、抖音关注度一般等因素，预计2026年最低录取位次在2025年基准17433名基础上继续小幅后移。，结合考生规模大增这一最强推升因素做有限修正，预测2026年最低录取位次约18049名，波动区间17549–18549名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约18049名，区间17549–18549名。位次在区间下限（17549名）以内的考生可重点冲刺一档王牌专业（自动化类、计算机类、人工智能等），这些专业对应控制科学与工程A+、计算机科学与技术A等优势学科且社会热度高；位次在预测值附近的考生应以二档专业为主攻方向（电子信息类、软件工程、智能制造、数学类等），兼顾学科实力与录取概率；位次在区间上限（18549名）附近的考生建议以三档专业保底（材料类、建筑类、经济管理试验班等），其中材料科学与工程为A-学科，性价比突出。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Zhejiang Province comprehensive category were 15177 → 15071 → 15142 → 16712 → 17433 respectively. From 2021 to 2023, it was basically stable in the 15000–15100 range. In 2024, it jumped to 16712 (about 1570 places lower than the previous year). In 2025, it continued to drop to 17433 (about 721 places lower than the previous year). Over the past two years, the cumulative drop is about 2290 places, showing a clear downward trend. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 17433. The enrollment plan for this university in Zhejiang comprehensive category: 85 in 2021, 84 in 2022, 85 in 2023, 78 in 2024, 78 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 82, an increase of 4 from 2025, about 5.1%, a small expansion, which has a certain alleviating effect on competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Northeastern University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Ranking, it is about 38th, with recent rankings stable in the 36–39 range, belonging to the upper-middle tier of 985 universities. The reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is 'neutral/mixed', mainly involving the naming controversy of the Qinhuangdao campus, with no major negative public opinion. In the 2025 cycle, there was a somewhat negative public opinion due to a safety accident involving 6 mineral processing students during an internship, but the impact was limited. The comprehensive Douyin popularity ranking is 82nd (sample of 14 videos, comprehensive popularity about 278,000), rated as 'average', with relatively low attention among 985 universities. No records of admission cut-off or anomalies were found. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Control Science and Engineering is A+, Computer Science and Technology is A, Software Engineering is A-, Metallurgical Engineering is A, Mechanical Engineering is A-, Materials Science and Engineering is A-, a total of 6 disciplines at A- or above. Advantageous disciplines such as Control, Computer, and Software are highly aligned with current socially popular majors, attracting high-scoring students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation are rated as 'highly recommended' or 'recommended' in the 2024–2026 major popularity analysis, consistent with Northeastern University's advantageous disciplines. The total number of general college entrance examination candidates in Zhejiang Province in 2026 is about 400,000, an increase of about 37.6% from 290,800 in 2025. The significant increase in candidate numbers will intensify competition across all levels of universities in the province. The provincial control line has been stable in recent years (2025 general first segment 490 points), with no drastic fluctuations. Northeastern University is located in Shenyang, Liaoning Province, and is a cross-provincial enrollment in Zhejiang, with a low proportion of local students. The 2026 plan of 82 students accounts for a small proportion of the university's total national plan, and regional preference factors have limited impact on Zhejiang candidates' application decisions.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous downward trend in rankings over the past two years, the intensified competition due to the significant increase in the number of candidates in Zhejiang Province in 2026 (+37.6%), the buffering effect of the small expansion of the 2026 enrollment plan (+4 students), and factors such as neutral university reputation and average Douyin attention, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will continue to drop slightly from the 2025 baseline of 17433. With limited correction based on the strongest driving factor of the significant increase in candidate numbers, the predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is about 18049, with a fluctuation range of 17549–18549.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking about 18049, range 17549–18549. Candidates with rankings within the lower limit of the range (17549) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors (Automation, Computer, Artificial Intelligence, etc.), which correspond to advantageous disciplines such as Control Science and Engineering A+ and Computer Science and Technology A, and have high social popularity. Candidates with rankings near the predicted value should target Tier 2 majors as the main direction (Electronic Information, Software Engineering, Intelligent Manufacturing, Mathematics, etc.), balancing discipline strength and admission probability. Candidates with rankings near the upper limit of the range (18549) are advised to use Tier 3 majors as safety options (Materials, Architecture, Economics and Management Pilot Class, etc.), among which Materials Science and Engineering is an A- discipline, offering outstanding cost-effectiveness.
